metadata.description: Microsoft AI Apps GBB skills catalog for the GitHub Copilot CLI ecosystem (Copilot CLI GA, Copilot Desktop App, VS Code agent mode, Claude Code). One plugin installs all 25 skills.

plugins.name: awesome-gbb
plugins.description: 25 reusable GBB skills: Azure infra (azd, Bicep, ACA), Foundry agents (hosted agents, RAG, MCP, evals, observability), governance (Citadel, AGT), cost analysis, tenant isolation, and enterprise automation. Threadlight pipeline moved to threadlight-skills. Zava skills moved to zava-constellation.
